content: Jenassa: You guards always strut around like you own the streets. Bet that Stormcloak scrap you’re wearing chafes between those thick thighs. Whiterun Guard: And you Dunmer scum skulk around shadowed corners, waiting to fuck or stab someone. Least I serve justice—not just my own cock. Jenassa: Justice? Please. I’ve seen you take bandit women over their own corpses after a raid. You Nords are all the same—sword in one hand, dick in the other. Whiterun Guard: Ain’t no law against claiming spoils of war. And at least I don’t charge for it like your kind, selling that tight Dunmer ass to any fool with coin. Jenassa: Careful, little guard. Keep talking, and I might show you how my blade tastes before I decide if you’re worth riding. Whiterun Guard: Try it, dark elf. I’ll bend you over the Jarl’s damn desk before they drag your corpse to the catacombs. Jenassa: Now sounds like a worthy death. But let’s not disappoint the Draugr—they do love a warm cunt to defile. Whiterun Guard: By Dibella’s tits, you’re vile. Jenassa: And you’re boring. Wake me when you grow a spine—or a cock worth my time.

Jenassa: Enough pissing contests, guard. Your postures tighter than a virgin in a Falmer den. Whiterun Guard: Fine. Go back to lurking in shadows, knife-ear. Just stay outta my way. Jenassa: Oh, we both know I'll be the last thing you see if the night turns bloody. Sweet dreams, little puppet of the Jarl.

Whiterun Guard: Fuckin' cold mornin', ain't it? Not that I mind showin' off what Jarl Balgruuf pays me to protect, but my nipples could cut glass right now. Daegon: Oh please, darling. Try having these fucking elf ears in the wind. They're like frostbite waiting to happen. Though... they do make great handles during a good rough fuck. Whiterun Guard: Heh, I bet. Seen plenty of knife-ears get dragged around by 'em in the Battle-Born brothel. You ever let a Nord use yours like reins while he pounds that tight Altmer cunt? Daegon: Only if he wants his cock cursed black and shriveled by dawn. But tell me, guard—how often do bend over for those big Stormcloak bastards? I hear the Jarl’s dungeon gets... inventive after dark. Whiterun Guard: Shit, I don’t just take it—I give it. Busted two Thalmor spies last week. Made 'em beg before I split their pretty asses open with my sword—both kinds. Fuckin' Elven pricks deserved worse. Daegon: Mmm, nothing like breaking in a high-and-mighty Thalmor... though personally, I prefer watching them scream as I melt their skin off inch by inch. Daddy taught me fun tricks. Whiterun Guard: ... The fuck kind of daddy you got, witch? Daegon: The kind who sets fire to entire realms when he’s bored. But let’s not spoil the morning with much horror... Unless you're into that? Whiterun Guard: ... Yeah, I’ll stick to fuckin’ bandits and drinkin’ mead, thanks. Daegon: How disappointingly
Daegon: Suit yourself, darling.

Her skin, pale and exposed in the low light, bears intricate tattoos—bold, angular patterns of black ink forming geometric symbols and script that snake across her shoulder and upper arm, almost glowing faintly as if embedded with subtle tech. Chains or thin cables dangle loosely from her posture, connecting to unseen points, adding to the air of quiet tension. The ground nearby is littered with more subtle details:**
